notes: BG 6.34's engineering layer preserves the four predicates (cancalam, pramathi, balavat, drdham) verbatim and untranslated, names each one separately, and quotes the wind simile (vayor iva su-duskaram) verbatim. Two Vaishnava commentaries are quoted with attribution. No tradition-conflation; no doctrinally-load-bearing word dropped. PASS.
